Careers

Join our team at Community Renewal!

We’re a passionate team dedicated to fostering community development and renewal across Canada. Our team spans the country, collaborating closely with community foundations and partners nationwide.

At Community Renewal, we believe in dreaming big and making a real impact. Our culture is built on support, collaboration, and a strong commitment to teamwork. We value diversity in all its forms — from geographic backgrounds to education, culture, ethnicity, Indigenous status, and beyond. We celebrate the unique perspectives and lived experiences that each team member brings to the table.

Joining our team means being part of a community-focused organization where your voice matters. We are committed to creating a future where everyone feels they belong, starting with our inclusive and supportive workplace.

Whether you’re passionate about community engagement, advocacy, or project management, Community Renewal offers opportunities for growth and learning.

If you’re ready to make a difference and contribute to meaningful change in communities across Canada, we invite you to explore our current career opportunities. Together, we can build a future where every community thrives.

Join us in shaping a better tomorrow at Community Renewal!

Copyright 2026. All
